name: Mussel & Saffron Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub mussels clean using several changes of fresh water and remove beards. Discard any cracked or open mussels.
2. Place mussels in a saucepan with white wine and water. Cover and cook over high heat, shaking the pan frequently for 6-7 minutes, or until shells open. Remove mussels that remain closed; strain liquid through a fine sieve and reserve.
3. Heat butter and oil in a saucepan. Add onion, garlic, leek, and fenugreek, cooking gently for 5 minutes.
4. Stir in flour and cook for 1 minute. Add saffron mixture, reserved cooking liquid (2-1/2 cups), and chicken stock to the pan.
5. Bring to a boil, cover, and simmer gently for 15 minutes.
6. Keep 8 mussels whole and remove remaining mussels from shells. Add all mussels to the soup and stir in chopped parsley, salt, pepper, and cream. Heat through for 2-3 minutes.
7. Garnish with parsley sprigs if desired and serve hot.
